block_05: What do these 3 things have in common? DigiMarCon, the Sydney Opera and kangaroos. They’re all in Sydney for you to see and attend on September 20th - 21st!
block_07: is a marketing, media and advertising conference. It’s a unique and exclusive opportunity for you to boost your marketing skills and network with top-industry affiliates!
block_10: Inspired: Speeches from industry experts will teach you the principles and skills of digital marketing.
block_11: Challenged: Listen to bold and powerful addresses from businesses who have successfully implemented digital marketing techniques and solutions. These riveting presentations will educate, challenge, and impress you in less than 20 minutes.
block_12: Transformed: Explore big ideas presented directly from the innovators and thought leaders of the changing business world. Highly valuable, pitch-free content, extensive networking opportunities and much more…
block_13: It’s also a unique opportunity to finally meet us in person (it’s our first time in Australia!). Let your manager know if you’re coming in order to book a meeting, and come by for a chat and some cool merch. 😉
block_14: Don’t miss this opportunity to visit ‘the land down under’, make professional connections and gain the latest knowledge in the world of digital marketing!
